testcase.name: test_reset_test_company_status

failure.message:
assert ('Reset rows: 1' in '' or 'Error' not in '[eval]:6
p...s v20.20.2
' + where '' = CompletedProcess(args=['node', '-e', '
const { Pool } = require('pg');
const pool = new Pool({ 
 connectionString: 'postgresql://neondb_owner:npg_j5oWLtA6DrXs@ep-twilight-hat-adrtam2f-pooler.c-2.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech/neondb?sslmode=require'
});
pool.query(\`UPDATE companies SET "subscriptionStatus"='suspended', "paypalSubscriptionId"='OLD-FAKE-ID' WHERE id='sa-test-1778785015'\`)
 .then(r => console.log('Reset rows:', r.rowCount))
 .catch(e => console.error('Error:', e.message))
 .finally(() => pool.end());
'], returncode=1, stdout='', stderr='[eval]:6
pool.query(\`UPDATE companies SET "subscriptionStatus"='suspended', "paypalSubscriptionId"='OLD-FAKE-ID' WHERE id='sa-test-1778785015'\`)
 ^

SyntaxError: Invalid or unexpected token
 at makeContextifyScript (node:internal/vm:185:14)
 at node:internal/process/execution:107:22
 at [eval]-wrapper:6:24
 at runScript (node:internal/process/execution:101:62)
 at evalScript (node:internal/process/execution:133:3)
 at node:internal/main/eval_string:51:3

'Error' is contained here: [eval]:6 pool.query(\`UPDATE companies SET "subscriptionStatus"='suspended', "paypalSubscriptionId"='OLD-FAKE-ID' WHERE id='sa-test-1778785015'\`) ^
